task_completion.description: Load the baseline simple_model_rocket.ork in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket GUI is open and the component tree or window title shows 'simple_model_rocket' is loaded.

task_completion.description: Add a Transition component to the aft end of the body tube
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Transition' component is visible at the bottom of the rocket design tree, attached to the aft end of the main body tube.

task_completion.description: Configure the boattail dimensions correctly (fore radius matches body tube, aft radius is smaller, length is within bounds)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Transition configuration window shows a Fore radius of 1.25 cm (12.5 mm / 0.0125 m), an Aft radius smaller than the Fore radius, and a Length between 1.5 cm and 15.0 cm (15 mm - 150 mm).

task_completion.description: Ensure the modified rocket maintains a stability margin of at least 1.0
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket main window or flight simulation tab displays a stability margin of 1.0 cal or greater for the modified design.
A save dialog, file manager, or terminal shows the file 'boattail_retrofit.ork' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Write a performance comparison report with all required metrics
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows 'boattail_report.txt' in the exports folder containing: baseline altitude, modified altitude, percentage change, boattail dimensions, and a confirmation of stability.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the rocket and run simulations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the OpenRocket interface (e.g., component configuration windows, simulation run dialogs) rather than just writing a script to generate the .ork file blindly.

integrity.description: The performance report contains actual simulation numbers
integrity.visual_evidence: The apogee values and percentage changes in the report look like realistic numerical outputs from OpenRocket simulations, not placeholder text like '[insert apogee here]'.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply copy the baseline file to the export path without modifications
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket GUI or file size/diffs (if visible in terminal) clearly show that the exported 'boattail_retrofit.ork' contains the new Transition component and is not identical to 'simple_model_rocket.ork'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The baseline rocket file is 'simple_model_rocket.ork'. The actual body tube radius to match for the fore radius is 0.0125m (12.5mm). The acceptable length range for the boattail transition is between 0.015m (15mm) and 0.150m (150mm). The modified design must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/boattail_retrofit.ork' and the report to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/boattail_report.txt'.
